text.message: Black had 3 cities and I’m getting robbed?
Like those cavs are going away
Why are you testing someone with a lead and tons of cards red
who has a ton of cards?
you have 1 dev card; black has 0
Why do u assume i have the lead?
No logic don’t trade either of ys
Don't see black winning in next 2-3 rounds -- you very close to wining and now blue
some 6s and you can win in a hurry
To take the road from blue wont be easy
Trading blue on 8 too… wild stuff red
You need to work on your game a lot
I need to win... not allow you to win
You’re giving up the win to everyone else
How you don’t see that is beyond me
even you should be able to do it from here
Not with you giving away points every turn
but for the wheat pull I'd have won this turn genious
So you’re bad at math too
knight plus vp plus city -- do the math
